message:
chore(artifacts): refresh test logs after fj-interpreters scan work

Regenerates 187 evidence artifacts under artifacts/e2e, artifacts/ci,
and artifacts/testing/logs after a fresh test run that exercised the
new functional scan sub-jaxpr execution path in fj-interpreters added
in the prior commit (frankenjax-u0y4).

These files are deterministic test logs, oracle outputs, and golden
journeys committed to track conformance evidence over time. The diff
is overwhelmingly environmental:

- rust nightly bumped from 1.96.0 (80d0e4be6 2026-03-25) to 1.97.0
  (17584a181 2026-04-13)
- cargo target dir changed from /tmp/cargo-target to a per-run
  /tmp/frankenjax-target-* path
- timestamp_unix_ms fields refreshed
- per-phase timings (setup_ms, execute_ms, verify_ms) re-measured

Plus the regenerated fj-interpreters partial_eval and staging logs
that reflect the scan code paths now compiling against the expanded
module surface. No oracle pass/fail flips — every refreshed entry
remains \"result\":\"pass\".

Affected directories
- artifacts/ci/runs/synthetic-forensics-test/
- artifacts/e2e/{e2e_*,golden_journeys/}
- artifacts/testing/logs/{fj-ad,fj-conformance,fj-core,fj-dispatch,
  fj-interpreters,fj-trace}/

Code-bearing changes for this feature are in the prior commit; this
commit is artifact-only and contains no behavior changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
